goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel 'doesn't need to have free parking' and should be in the 'expensive' price range.
The hotel should be in the 'centre' and should 'include free wifi'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has 'free parking'.
Make sure you get 'star of the hotel', 'postcode', and 'hotel type'.
You are also looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be 'in the same area as the hotel' and should serve 'chinese' food.
Make sure you get 'address', 'phone number', and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel doesn't need to have free parking and should be in the expensive price range
The hotel should be in the centre and should include free wifi
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has free parking
Make sure you get star of the hotel, postcode, and hotel type
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the same area as the hotel and should serve chinese food
Make sure you get address, phone number, and postcode
